title: Add column and select in same transaction
poc: ALTER TABLE a ADD COLUMN c INTEGER;
key_bug_features: Add column and select in same transaction
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50));
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN age INTEGER;
SELECT age FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN salary DECIMAL(10, 2);
